scientific_question: Which primary publications report mechanism, active-catalyst-state, computational, and transition-state evidence directly relevant or explicitly analogous to the chiral-bisborane-catalyzed alpha-alkylation of 2-ethylbenzoxazole with tert-butyl acrylate?

reaction.transformation_class: chiral-bisborane-catalyzed alpha-alkylation of 2-alkylbenzoxazoles with electron-deficient olefins
catalyst_states: source label CAT2 generated in situ from HB(C6F5)2 and chiral diene L2; complete active state unresolved
bond_changes: alpha C-H deprotonation is a literature submodel hypothesis
carbon-carbon bond formation between the benzoxazole alpha carbon and the acrylate beta carbon is a literature submodel hypothesis
unresolved: whether the achiral BF3 or B(C6F5)3 sequence transfers to CAT2

exact_phrases: Borane-Catalyzed Enantioselective alpha-Alkylation of Unactivated 2-Alkylbenzoxazoles with Electron-Deficient Olefins
transformation_terms: benzoxazole conjugate addition to electron-deficient olefins

mechanism_hypotheses.label: The published BF3 or B(C6F5)3 proton-transfer and carbon-carbon bond-forming sequence may be relevant to CAT2 without establishing the CAT2 enantiodetermining pathway.
keywords: borane carbon-carbon bond formation transition state

known_citations.role: direct experimental publication and published achiral mechanistic submodel seed
